preflight_categories.label: Real observation data
required_evidence: approved local data path or archive access record
preflight_categories.notes: The checksum-verified HIP99427 GBT ABACAD cadence is approved for local processing; external submission remains disabled.

preflight_categories.label: Real labeled dataset
required_evidence: curated dataset admission record with zero blockers
preflight_categories.notes: Blocked: the frozen HIP99427 artifact contains project-generated cadence outcomes, not pre-existing independently supplied row-level ground truth. It is legacy diagnostic evidence only.

preflight_categories.label: Scoring calibration
preflight_categories.notes: Blocked from learned calibration and production scoring claims until adequate pre-existing row-level labels with documented provenance exist. Deterministic noise summaries remain local diagnostics.

preflight_categories.label: Real site-specific RFI database
required_evidence: RFI database admission record with zero blockers
preflight_categories.notes: GBT provisional RFI catalog operator sign-off is complete for local fixture use from public regulatory documentation; GBT site-monitoring confirmation and external validation are not claimed.

preflight_categories.label: Public reproducibility review
preflight_categories.notes: Repository policy and tests reproducibly prohibit project-owned label creation and keep learned promotion fail-closed. This category does not authorize any labeled dataset.
